parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({chat_id: String($json.chatId), step: 1, answers: {}, metrics: {}, updated_at: new Date().toISOString()}) }}

parameters.text:

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({chat_id: $json.chatId, step: $json.nextStep, answers: $json.answers, updated_at: new Date().toISOString()}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  tomorrow_priority: $('Build Diary Prompt').first().json.answers.tomorrow_priority,
  todays_hardship:   $('Build Diary Prompt').first().json.answers.todays_hardship,
  gratitude:         $('Build Diary Prompt').first().json.answers.gratitude,
  day_summary:       $('Build Diary Prompt').first().json.answers.day_summary,
  todays_idea:       $('Build Diary Prompt').first().json.answers.todays_idea,
  ai_draft:          $('Generate Diary Draft').first().json.message?.content || '',
  mood_energy:       $('Parse Metrics').first().json.mood_energy,
  sleep_hours:       $('Parse Metrics').first().json.sleep_hours,
  exercised:         $('Parse Metrics').first().json.exercised,
  goal_achievement:  $('Parse Metrics').first().json.goal_achievement
}) }}
